overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian village during sunset, transitioning abruptly to night. The character moves through crop drying fields, crosses an irrigation channel, and enters a village street lined with mud-brick buildings and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: crop drying fields near stone outbuilding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the crop fields, passing by a stone hut with thatched roof and drying crops spread on the ground

notable_agents.action: villager sitting by the stone hut, working with crops
villager walking across the field carrying goods

entered.detail: small stone building with thatched palm leaf roof and open doorway
tall date palm trees scattered throughout the landscape
patches of red-brown crops spread on the ground for drying in the sun
large round woven baskets used for storing and drying crops
tall stone obelisk monument visible in the distant village center

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open agricultural fields during golden hour, passing a stone hut with a thatched roof on the left. The ground is covered with drying crops and large wicker baskets, while palm trees frame the background and an obelisk stands visible in the distant village center.

scene_state.functional_zone: village irrigation channel and main path

events.description: crosses the stone-lined irrigation channel and enters the main village street with mud-brick buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path, crossing the irrigation channel and entering the village street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: villager in white clothing walking past the character on the path

entered.detail: stone-lined water channel running alongside the path with green algae
traditional Egyptian mud brick houses with flat roofs and small windows
simple wooden post fencing marking field boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open fields toward the village center, crossing a stone irrigation channel. Mud-brick buildings appear on the right side of the path, and the obelisk shifts to the right as the character advances. More villagers are visible walking along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street at night with torch lighting

events.description: abrupt transition from sunset to night with full moon rising and torches lit on buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the village at night, navigating by moonlight and the warm glow of wall-mounted torches

entered.detail: burning torches mounted on mud-brick walls providing warm orange light
bright full moon visible in the night sky illuminating the scene

segments.scene_description: Following a time transition to night, the character continues through the village under moonlight. Torches on the right side cast warm light against the cool blue night, while the obelisk remains visible ahead. The palm trees and buildings are now silhouetted against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian agricultural landscape that transforms from a golden sunset into a moonlit night. It begins with the character walking through open fields filled with drying crops and wicker baskets, passing a thatched stone hut as a distant obelisk marks the village center. As the character advances, the path narrows and crosses a stone irrigation channel, bringing mud-brick buildings and villagers into closer view while the obelisk shifts toward the right. The scene then abruptly shifts to night, where the warm golden light is replaced by a cool blue moonlight that silhouettes the palm trees and buildings. Finally, the camera continues forward under the night sky, guided by the warm glow of torches lining the street toward the still-visible obelisk ahead.
